citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: Offer advice and information on finding a flat in the private sector... Provide a dedicated member of staff to provide information and to answer any related queries, or signpost you to a person or service to help you further

findings.text: No email or case note records were provided in this work order. The only source is the Private Accommodation Brochure 2025 (NAP-SRC-0014).
The Private Accommodation Brochure 2025 describes a private accommodation support service that offers advice, flat viewings, and signposting to other services.
The brochure does not contain any reference to Anfal or any individual student's access to the support service.

proposed_artifacts.content:
# Evidence Search Result: Brochure Provision / Support Service Access by Anfal

**Task:** T-NAP-SRC-0014-005-FU-EMAILS-CASENOTES

**Source Reviewed:** NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025)

**Finding:** The brochure describes the accommodation support service (advice, flat viewings, signposting) but contains no reference to Anfal or any individual student. No email or case note records were provided in this work order.

**Conclusion:** Cannot determine whether Anfal was provided the brochure or accessed the support service based on available evidence. Requires review of email and case note records.
proposed_artifacts.title: Brochure provision and support service access search result

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search the matter for email records and case notes related to Anfal. Look for any communication regarding provision of the Private Accommodation Brochure 2025 or access to the accommodation support service (privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk). If records exist, extract relevant excerpts and cite them.
proposed_tasks.title: Locate and review email and case note records for Anfal's brochure provision or support service access

risk_flags.text: Task cannot be completed as specified because the required email and case note records are absent from the work order context.

summary: Task requires searching email and case note records for evidence of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal. No email or case note sources were provided in this work order. The only source is the Private Accommodation Brochure 2025 (NAP-SRC-0014), which describes the accommodation support service but does not contain any records of Anfal or any specific student. Cannot perform the requested search without the relevant records.

uncertainties.text: No email or case note records were provided; cannot determine whether Anfal was provided the brochure or accessed the support service.
